creator: stolz@i2.informatik.rwth-aachende
text:
The XFree4-port contains the module drm which is required for the
DRM/DRI support. It has to be build by hand but fails. Several people
on the mailinglists pointed out the required changes which haven´t
made it into the port. Further newsgroup and mailinglist messages
suggest that this module should be fixed, if not at least because
of the amount of confusion it´s causing.

Fix: uudecode & apply following patch, then use "make -f Makefile.bsd; make -f Makefile.bsd install" in xc/programs/Xserver/hw/xfree86/os-support/bsd/drm/kernel to install the modules.
